en: Is he dying? I don't know. Jesus Christ. Where were you? What happened to you?
ko: 어디 있었어? 무슨 일이 있었던 거야?

en: Blocked by a freight train. Why would you put a train crossing in the middle of a downtown intersection? I didn't.
Well, where'd it come from? Well, let me ask you a question. Why the hell were we ambushed, huh?
ko: 내가 한 게 아니야. 어디서 온 거지? 질문 하나 해볼게.

en: Those were not normal projections. They've been trained, for God's sakes. You're right. How could he be trained?
ko: 그들은 훈련받았어, 제발. 맞아. 어떻게 훈련받을 수 있지?

en: Fisher's... had an extractor teach his subconscious to defend itself, so his subconscious is militarized.
ko: 피셔가 그의 잠재의식이 스스로 방어하도록 가르쳤어,

en: It should have shown in the research. I'm sorry. So why the hell didn't it? Calm down.
Don't tell me to calm down! This was your job, God damn it!
ko: 진정하라고 하지 마. 이건 네 일이었어, 젠장.

en: This was your responsibility! You were meant to check Fisher's background thoroughly!
ko: 너는 피셔의 배경을 철저히 확인해야 했어.

en: We are not prepared for this type of violence! We have dealt with sub-security before.
ko: 우리는 이런 종류의 폭력에 대비하지 않았어.

en: We'll be a little more careful, and we're gonna be fine. This was not a part of the plan! He's dying, for God's sake!
ko: 이건 계획의 일부가 아니었어. 그는 지금 죽어가고 있어.

en: Come on, let's put him out of his misery. Don't do that. Don't do that.
ko: 제발, 그를 고통에서 벗어나게 해줘. 그러지 마.

en: He's in agony. I'm waking him up. No.
ko: 그를 깨우고 있어. 아니. 그를 깨우지 못해.

en: It won't wake him up. What do you mean, it won't wake him up? It won't wake him up.
When we die in a dream, we wake up. Not from this.
We don't have any sedative to wake up that way. Right, so what happens when we die?
ko: 맞아. 그럼 우리가 죽으면 어떻게 돼?

en: We drop into limbo. Are you serious? Limbo?
Unconstructed dream space. Well, what the hell is down there?
ko: 림보? 비구성 꿈 공간. 대체 뭐야?
